description: Perform a multivariable logistic regression analysis on the Oswego sample dataset (Sample.prj > Oswego) to identify the food item causing the outbreak. Use 'ILL' as the outcome variable and include at least five food exposure variables (such as VANILLA, CHOCOLATE, CABBAGE, BROWNBREAD, or FRUITSALAD) as terms. Identify the food item with the highest significant Odds Ratio (P-Value < 0.05). Save the analysis output to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\logistic_output.html and create a text summary report at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\logistic_report.txt listing the significant risk factor, its Odds Ratio, and a brief conclusion.
